name: Tranject
short_description: Tranject is a 2D-space-shooter with a complex story about cleaning space and collecting green essence. The base game as well as a possible expansion is developed by Jadon-K. Fischer.
detailed_description:
Content


In the year 20XX there was a soldier who executed an experiment
for fighting a pollutant in space wich ended in desaster and endanged
it even more. Now a scientist established a unit of explorers and fighters
who have to clean it up as well as make it through the obstacles that
may show up. Or let's call it solve conflicts.

Tranject is a 2D-space-shooter with a complex story about cleaning space and
collecting green essence. The base game as well as a possible expansion is developed
by Jadon-K. Fischer.

Tranject is
"made with Unity"

Features

  • 12-15 minutes for each operation!
  • 14 different story missions!
  • 3 background missions in the past!
  • 3 additional bonus deployments!
  • Partly random generated enemy waves!
  • 12 unlockable specific ship abilities, weapons and skins!
  • 9 challenging bosses and some additional minibosses!
  • Over 50 dangerous foes!
  • Diversified events!
  • Multi-perspective, ongoing story!
  • Explorable base with interesting dialogs and characters!
  • Animated cutscenes!
  • Pixel look in modern environment
  • Several playthroughs in order to relive the game and expose secrets!
